clusters.justification: These terms co-activate across salience and interoceptive neurocircuitry, representing the broad functional axis of processing physiological arousal, subjective feeling states, and threat detection.
Tethered to frontostriatal and dopaminergic pathways, these terms reflect the macroscopic system dedicated to computing stimulus worth, encoding reinforcement, and driving motivated decision-making.

Anchored in the default mode network, this cluster captures the overarching functional space where internally directed, self-referential thought converges with the processing of interpersonal and agentic information.
